cases.prompt: Create an Obsidian base with a table view of all my task notes filtered by status

assertions.text: Creates a .base file containing valid YAML in the vault
Adds filters (e.g. file.hasTag("task") or status comparison) to scope which notes appear
Defines a table view with an order list of properties to display

cases.prompt: .base 파일로 독서 목록 카드 뷰 만들어줘

assertions.text: Configures a cards view for the reading list
Defines a formula (e.g. status_icon or reading_time) and references it as formula.X in the view

cases.prompt: add a formula column showing days until each task is due

assertions.text: Computes days via (date(due) - today()).days, accessing the Duration's .days field rather than dividing
Guards the formula with if() so notes without a due date don't error
